mapper.select: WITH limited_sessions AS ( SELECT session_id, mode, status, duration_minutes, elapsed_seconds, total_score, passed, created_at, updated_at FROM interview_sessions ORDER BY updated_at DESC, session_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} ), message_stats AS ( SELECT m.session_id, COUNT(*) AS message_count, MAX(m.seq_no) AS last_seq_no FROM interview_session_messages m INNER JOIN limited_sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id GROUP BY m.session_id ) SELECT s.session_id, s.mode, s.status, s.duration_minutes, s.elapsed_seconds, COALESCE(ms.message_count, 0) AS message_count, s.total_score, s.passed, lm.content AS last_message_content, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM limited_sessions s LEFT JOIN message_stats ms ON ms.session_id = s.session_id LEFT JOIN interview_session_messages lm ON lm.session_id = s.session_id AND lm.seq_no = ms.last_seq_no ORDER BY s.updated_at DESC, s.session_id DESC
